title: Disposition Phase 1 -- Hold-Sell-Refi Analysis Downstream Data
description: Shape of the dataForDownstream object written to the master checkpoint by the disposition hold-sell-refi analysis phase. Covers NPV comparison across hold/sell/refi scenarios, IRR analysis, tax impact, and the terminal recommendation.

npvComparison.description: NPV comparison across hold, sell, and refi scenarios under base, bull, and bear cases.

holdNPV.description: Net present value of continuing to hold the asset.

assumptions.description: Key assumptions driving hold NPV scenarios.

sellNPV.description: Net present value of selling the asset at current market pricing.

assumptions.description: Key assumptions driving sell NPV scenarios.

refiNPV.description: Net present value of refinancing and continuing to hold.

assumptions.description: Key assumptions driving refi NPV scenarios.

sellPremiumOverHold.description: Sell NPV premium over hold NPV in base case, expressed as decimal (e.g., 0.05 = 5%).

sensitivityNotes.description: Narrative on which assumptions most materially affect the NPV comparison.

targetExitPrice.description: Recommended exit price based on sell NPV analysis. Minimum: 0.

irrToDate.description: IRR achieved from acquisition through current period, expressed as decimal (e.g., 0.15 = 15%).

projectedExitIRR.description: Projected IRR at exit under base case sell scenario.

remainingUpside.description: Quantification of remaining value-creation upside if held longer.

occupancyUpsideBps.description: Basis points of occupancy improvement available.

markToMarketRentGap.description: Percentage gap between in-place and market rents.

capexValueCreation.description: Value creation from remaining capex projects.

timeToCapture_months.description: Estimated months to capture remaining upside.

taxImpact.description: Tax impact analysis for each exit strategy.

exchange1031Benefit.description: NPV benefit of 1031 exchange vs outright sale.

afterTaxProceedsBySrategy.description: After-tax proceeds comparison by exit strategy.

refiAnalysis.description: Refinance feasibility and sizing (populated when REFI is a viable alternative).

lenderType.description: Agency, CMBS, bank, or life company.

lpYieldUnderRefi.description: LP cash-on-cash yield under refi scenario.

holdDecisionRationale.description: Narrative rationale for HOLD decision (populated only when recommendation is HOLD).
